THE PLATFORM · 03 OF 08
The platform

Own. Operate. Govern.

Three sub-claims, three proof points. The structural device for everything that follows.

01
O
Own

Open weights, on your hardware

Llama, Mistral, Qwen on your GPU pool, in your environment. The platform is yours. The custody is yours.

02
P
Operate

Inside your existing trust boundary

Integrates with your IdP, RBAC, SIEM. No new perimeter, no new vendor risk review.

03
G
Govern

Audit-grade trail by default

Every prompt, response, model call logged. Designed for the regulator review, not the demo.

CONFIDENTIAL · ARDA × ACME 03 / 08
